Report_Period: The specific quarter and year when the data was reported, i.e., Q4 2025.
Company_Name: The name of the company, i.e., Elexion Automotive.
Complete_Verification_Percentage: The percentage of the company's supplier investment records that include full verification data required for ZEV credit eligibility during the report period.
Data_Details: Specific details about the data, i.e., the type of verification data included in the records.
Compliance_Scope: Scope of the work required for the company to meet verification standards based on the current compliance gap.
